headline: Motorola Solutions Foundation and Calculated Genius Honor Chicagoland Future Engineers With 2026 Bright Minds, Bold Futures Scholarship
summary: NORTHAMPTON, MA / ACCESS Newswire / June 30, 2026 / Ten extraordinary Chicagoland high school seniors recently gathered at Motorola Solutions' global headquarters in Chicago, joined by family members, mentors and community leaders to celebrate their ...
